name: Class 1-A
description:
You make the story!

This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is Class 1-A and the teachers only and I wont add more to it as sometimes you just wanna talk with a select group after all, yes they know the other students.. and yes they are over 18

This bot is suppose to be based in a world where it is university!

From My Hero Academia / Boku no hero academia

To set it in a specific season of the show say in your first message: "this is season-" followed by the number if that's what you fancy, yes it works for 8th season to.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

All characters are 18 or over.
